zh.Burgess Hill, Sussex, England: 英國素可伯吉斯 希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Burghersh於1327年出生在英國素可伯吉斯 希爾時，她的父親Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh40歲，母親Countess Elizabeth de Verdun22歲。她於大約1341年與John de Mohun 2nd Baron在英國薩默塞特登斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1404年10月4日在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Burghersh于1327年出生在英国素可伯吉斯 希爾时，她的父亲Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh40岁，母亲Countess Elizabeth de Verdun22岁。她于大约1341年与John de Mohun 2nd Baron在英国薩默塞特登斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1404年10月4日在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Burghersh was born in 1327, in Burgess Hill, Sussex, England, her father, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, was 40 and her mother, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, was 22. She married John de Mohun 2nd Baron about 1341, in Dunster, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 4 October 1404, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England: Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Burghersh est née en 1327, à Burgess Hill, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John de Mohun 2nd Baron environ 1341, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 octobre 1404, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England: Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Burghersh 1327 in Burgess Hill, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh 40 und ihre Mutter Countess Elizabeth de Verdun 22. Sie hat um 1341 in Dunster, Somerset, England John de Mohun 2nd Baron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Oktober 1404 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John de Mohun 2nd Baron circa 1341, nel Dunster, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Burghershが1327年にイギリススセックスブルジェス ヒルで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghershは40歳，母Countess Elizabeth de Verdunは22歳であった。約1341年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターでJohn de Mohun 2nd Baronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1404年10月4日にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스베스트리
ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Burghersh(이)가 1327년 영국 수세스 버지스 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Elizabeth de Verdun(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1341년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 John de Mohun 2nd Baron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1404년 10월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England: Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Burghersh nasceu em 1327, em Burgess Hill, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Mohun 2nd Baron aproximadamente 1341, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1404, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England: ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Burghersh родилась в 1327 г. в местности бургесс хилл, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Mohun 2nd Baron около 1341 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 октября 1404 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John de Mohun 2nd Baron aproximadamente 1341, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1404, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
